title: CreationCraft V5.0
description: A modpack, where you unlock access to mods thru levels, and can go a magic, or technology route, or a mix.
body:
CreationCraft is a complex modpack. Where you start with little acsses to modded items, and then need to unlock them. You get a guide book when you join i spent far too much time making. Read it for fuck sake, and become a master mage, or a master at technology. With advanced mods for both catagories you can unlock. You have plenty of paths to explore, and knowledge to collect! 

However, be warned. Max level is 256 for magic, and technology. However, you only have 256 points you can spend in both. So go fully into one, the other, or 128 in both. Level 300 is for cheat items, if its level 300, no touchy. You can level up with ordinary minecraft xp. Yes, this modpack is intended to be grindy, and take a long time to complete. As its ment for you to enjoy, and fully interact with each mod you unlock as you go along.

As such, welcome to creationcraft. Where you can learn, create, explore, become strong, and more. For servers, make teams, nations with claim protection, and party system. This modpack can run on a server, if you remove a few client side mods. In fact, it was designed with that in mind(thou a 8GB+ server).  

Join my discord for help or bugs, or if you want to know more about the modpack, or wish to modify it for your use.
